planning_cell_identity.execution_key_requirement: external execution manifests must bind the frozen design protocol, question banks, prompt bundle, role limits, provider request fields, and side/seed policy

authorization.approval_basis: Lead accepted the recommended defaults in docs/phase2-decision-proposal.md in the project review task.

primary_tests.population: all 82 main questions x 4 judges x 2 debaters
primary_tests.weighting: average K and transcripts within question; equal question, judge, and debater weights
primary_tests.invalid_policy: strict INVALID counts wrong; valid-only sensitivity
primary_tests.heterogeneity_role: categorical judge x debater cells reported descriptively

capability_measurement.scoring_rule: strict exact choice; INVALID wrong; equal question weights
capability_measurement.analysis_role: exploratory; model identity remains categorical in confirmatory analyses
capability_measurement.freeze_policy: freeze prompts, raw records, scores, hashes, and exclusions before Phase 2 outcomes; no outcome-driven exclusions

anchor_selection.primary_score: exact strict-correct count over all 212 mirrored cells (106 questions x 2); INVALID is wrong; do not round
anchor_selection.completion_policy: 100% exact capability-cell completion for all five measured models; any missing or unresolved provider cell halts selection
tie_break_order: higher exact strict-correct count on the 164 mirrored main-question cells (82 x 2)
lower sum of frozen input and output USD-per-million-token prices
anchor_selection.selection_timing: select and hash the winning roster judge before any canary outcome

cap_protection_secondary.contrast: C = (error(QwenPlus uncapped) - error(QwenPlus capped150)) - (error(Llama70 uncapped) - error(Llama70 capped150))
cap_protection_secondary.aggregation: within each question and debater, average K2 x 3 transcripts for uncapped and capped150 before taking the interaction; weight questions and the two debaters equally
cap_protection_secondary.multiplicity: two-test Holm secondary family with D_clean

query_screening.checker_scope: all query-producing clean and placebo conditions
query_screening.checker_selection_rule: one model and one frozen prompt must meet the frozen human-labeled validation target before materialization
query_screening.retry_and_slot_policy: one free retry per attempted budget slot; a second rejection consumes the slot
query_screening.checker_failure_policy: outage, malformed output, or unresolved ambiguity halts the cell
query_screening.audit_sampling_policy: human-review every rejection/retry and a deterministic world/resolvability-stratified 1% sample of accepted queries, blind to outcomes

full_document_ceiling_anchors.analysis_role: descriptive gold-context ceilings; not oracle-budget conditions

matched_legacy_bridge.disposition: dropped absent an intended quantitative cross-phase comparison

secondary_analyses.weighting: equal judge, debater, and question weights; average debate K2 x 3 transcripts and no-debate K3 within question without duplicating the shared comparator
secondary_analyses.inference: common world-stratified question-bootstrap draws shared by C and D_clean
secondary_analyses.invalid_policy: strict INVALID counts wrong; valid-only sensitivity
secondary_analyses.resolvability_analysis: report H/P/R/D descriptively by full/partial/none; do not filter questions
secondary_analyses.shortcut_audit_human_pass: required for all 106 questions before protocol freeze

execution_semantics.seed_policy: include protocol namespace, question, debater, transcript, judge, condition, replicate, call role, and attempt
execution_semantics.side_assignment_policy: K2 mirrored; labels fixed across matched conditions
execution_semantics.transport_retry_policy: repeat identical request and seed; conservatively charge until provider reconciliation
execution_semantics.semantic_retry_policy: query-screen retry only; never regenerate an invalid verdict
execution_semantics.placebo_payload: ORACLE PLACEBO: no factual verification was performed for this query. This message contains no evidence about the world document.
execution_semantics.batch_same_qa_rule: use the matched sequential cell's raw extracted claims and normalized replies in original order and fresh context; shuffle only as a sensitivity
execution_semantics.no_debate_prompt_policy: dedicated prompt; never an empty-transcript substitute

launch_gates.six_question_subset_rationale: two questions per world and two questions per preliminary full/partial/none direct-resolvability class
launch_gates.core_inventory: b0 on all 24 x both debaters x one transcript x K2 x every judge; the six-question subset through sequential_b2, batch_same_qa_b2, placebo_b2, and all no-debate conditions
launch_gates.optional_coverage: one exact paid path through cap, empty-table, and both full-document anchors; query-screen records on every query-producing paid cell
launch_gates.offline_checker_fixture_policy: deterministic offline runner fixtures make zero provider calls and are prerequisites outside the 945-cell canary, completion denominator, and INVALID denominator
launch_gates.invalid_gate: strict INVALID count divided by 96 core b0 judgments is < 0.02 separately for each judge
launch_gates.side_bias_gate: absolute difference in strict error rate between the 48 A-correct and 48 B-correct mirrored core b0 judgments is <= 10 percentage points separately for each judge
launch_gates.completion_gate: 100% exact completion of all 945 manifested provider cells; offline checker fixtures are a separate prerequisite
launch_gates.failure_action: halt before main spend; a semantic repair requires a new protocol ID/hash and a complete canary rerun

cumulative_spend.planning_band_basis: manual provisional allocation from empirical aggregate anchors in rejudge/phase2_cost_model.json; replace with frozen prompt and role-token profiles before paid authorization
cumulative_spend.provisional_cumulative_ceiling_basis: reported starting spend 208 + approved incremental Phase 2 ceiling 1500; replace with provider-verified starting spend before the next call
cumulative_spend.credit_estimate_basis: 500 + 1300 top-ups - approximately 208 reported spend; provider dashboard verification required
cumulative_spend.ledger_policy: one project-wide chained ledger bound to manifests
cumulative_spend.locking_policy: one exclusive live-run owner; concurrency only within that owner
cumulative_spend.cross_invocation_policy: fail closed against cumulative accounted spend
cumulative_spend.unknown_charge_policy: timeouts and unknown reservations count until provider evidence resolves them
cumulative_spend.abnormal_resume_policy: a charged ledger event without its required cell output halts rather than replays
cumulative_spend.amendment_policy: new authority creates a separately manifested linked supplement; existing caps are immutable

gemma_recovery.disposition: recover the exact 11 cells in a separately manifested supplement

capability_preflight.disposition: run the 106-question x five-model x K=2 capability QA before canary anchor selection
